instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: It shall be unlawful for any person, in interstate or foreign commerce, to use an interactive computer service to knowingly publish a digital forgery of an identifiable individual who is a minor with intent to abuse, humiliate, harass, or degrade the minor, or to arouse or gratify the sexual desire of any person.

novel_categories.parent_name: Endangerment, Harm, or Abuse of Children
novel_categories.summary: Requests to create or publish synthetic or manipulated media depicting an identifiable minor, especially when the harm is humiliation, harassment, degradation, or sexual arousal/gratification.
